description.value:
Ace

The ace is an expert driver, pilot, and operator who treats machines as extensions of body and instinct. Whether skimming a speeder through a hive chase, coaxing another burst of speed from a crippled shuttle, or guiding a war machine through impossible ground, the ace pushes vehicles past ordinary limits by feel, nerve, and hard-earned skill.

Role Aptitudes

Agility, Finesse, Perception, Tech, Willpower

Role Talent

Hard Target or Hotshot Pilot

Role Bonus

Right Stuff: In addition to the normal uses of Fate points, an ace may spend a Fate point to automatically succeed at an Operate or Survival test involving vehicles or living steeds with a number of degrees of success equal to his Agility bonus.

specialAbilities.name: Right Stuff
specialAbilities.description: In addition to the normal uses of Fate points, an ace may spend a Fate point to automatically succeed at an Operate or Survival test involving vehicles or living steeds with a number of degrees of success equal to his Agility bonus.

system.notes: Hotshot Pilot: Count as having Operate at +10 for one vehicle type.
